prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a young woman with long chestnut-brown hair in two loose braids standing beneath a massive dark cherry blossom tree, wearing a soft cream knit sweater and gently holding a single pink rose near her lips. The scene is set in an enchanted old European stone clock tower garden at golden hour, with the tall ornate clock tower in the background slightly out of focus, covered in climbing roses and greenery. Frame the subject in the lower foreground beside the textured tree trunk on the left, with pink roses growing from the bark and dense sakura branches arching across the top. Add exactly 1 prominent clock tower, exactly 1 large cherry tree trunk, exactly 1 rose held by the subject, and many windblown pink petals drifting through warm sunset light. Use a romantic fairytale atmosphere, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, warm backlighting, glowing rim light on the hair, detailed fabric texture, natural skin tones, cinematic color grading, realistic photography style, 35mm portrait lens look, vertical 2:3 composition, dreamy but photorealistic. The visible face should match a natural soft portrait look; keep the mood serene, nostalgic, and elegant. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.
